summary: Excellent audience tape with crystal‑clear sound from the hill side, though the show itself isn’t described
review: The reviewer hails this as one of the best‑sounding AUD recordings from a shed, noting the lack of boomy echo and a clear mix captured near Jerry’s side of the stage aimed at the front‑of‑house speakers. No musical performance details are given, so the show quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single five‑star review focusing on superb recording quality; no information on musical performance, so rating leans heavily on the excellent audio but confidence is low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp sound with minimal echo; recorded from outside the taper section near the front‑of‑house speakers on Jerry's side, avoiding typical shed boomy ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments about performance or set structure were provided in the review.
